description:
## Background

Issue Detail currently shows an Issue's parent but not the Issues that reference it as their Beadwork `parent`. Beadsmith already loads every Workspace Issue via structured `bw list --all --json` data, so Child Issues can be derived without a second source of truth or parsing human CLI output.

Triage: ready-for-agent

## Goal

Let users inspect and navigate an Issue's Child Issues from Issue Detail, with Beadwork-compatible ordering, conditional visibility, and real-desktop proof.

## Delivery plan

```mermaid
graph LR
  A[Derive and display Child Issues] --> B[Order and hide empty section]
  A --> C[Navigate to Child Issues]
  B --> D[Desktop E2E proof]
  C --> D
```

## Decisions

- Derive Child Issues from loaded `allIssues` whose `parent` equals the selected Issue ID.
- Render ID, status, then title after Dependencies.
- Order by priority P0–P4, then oldest creation date; omit the final section when empty.
- Child navigation preserves the active Issue List View and selected detail survives filtering while the Issue remains in All Issues.
title: Show Child Issues in Issue Detail
